title: Juana Pola | Visual Artist
description: Official portfolio of Juana Pola, contemporary fine art photographer from the Isthmus of Tehuantepec. Explore her visual artwork and exhibitions, featuring profound narratives around women, sexual dissidence, and cultural identity.
keywords: contemporary mexican photographer, oaxacan fine art photography, isthmus of tehuantepec artist, latin american visual artist, mexican indigenous contemporary art, women in photography mexico, juanapola portfolio
